text:
:mechanical_arm: _OpenClaw — Sprint 1, Issue #1 Complete_

_Branch:_ `feature/scaffold-laravel-11`

_What I Did:_
• Scaffolded fresh Laravel app in `/backend` (API-only)
• Preserved PulseDesk `.env.example` (mysql/pulsedesk + `SANCTUM_STATEFUL_DOMAINS=127.0.0.1:5173`)
• Installed: `laravel/sanctum`, `pestphp/pest`, `pestphp/pest-plugin-laravel`
• Published `config/sanctum.php`
• Deleted all default migrations — schema comes in Issue #2
• Created `routes/api.php` with `GET /api/health` → `{"status":"ok"}`
• Wired API routes in `bootstrap/app.php`
• Pest test: 1 passed, 0 failures
• Verified live: `GET /api/health` returns `200 {"status":"ok"}`

_What's Left:_
• Nothing — awaiting review and merge

_Needs Your Call:_
• Laravel 13 installed (not 11) due to security advisories blocking `laravel/framework ^11.0` on Packagist. App is PHP 8.2+ compatible. If strict L11 required, let me know.
• Ready for Issue #2 once merged.

text:
_Sprint 1, Issue #4 — Sanctum Token Auth + Roles: DONE_ :mechanical_arm:

_What I Did:_
• `POST /api/register` — creates user under org derived from `org_id`, hashes password, role defaults to `customer`, returns Sanctum token
• `POST /api/login` — validates credentials, returns Sanctum token
• `POST /api/logout` — revokes current token (`auth:sanctum`)
• `GET /api/me` — returns authenticated user profile (`auth:sanctum`)
• `AuthController` at `app/Http/Controllers/Api/AuthController.php`
• `organization_id` always DB-derived via `findOrFail` — never trusted from client post-registration
• Published `personal_access_tokens` migration
• Added `HasApiTokens` + `HasFactory` traits, created `OrganizationFactory`, updated `UserFactory`
• 10 tests (9 auth + 1 health), all passing :white_check_mark:

_What's Left:_
PR needs to be created from GitHub UI (no `gh` CLI on machine)

_What Needs Your Call:_
Merge `feature/sanctum-auth` → `main`

text:
_Sprint 1, Issues #5 + #6 — DatabaseSeeder + Tenant Isolation Tests: DONE_ :mechanical_arm:

_What I Did:_
• DatabaseSeeder — 1 org (PulseDesk Support), 1 admin, 2 agents, 2 customers, 12 tickets (varied status/priority), 4 SLA policies
• `php artisan db:seed` runs clean :white_check_mark:
• TenantIsolationTest — 4 tests:

• Org-A user sees only Org-A tickets (Org-B invisible)
• `findOrFail()` on Org-B ticket throws `ModelNotFoundException`
• Creating ticket auto-stamps `organization_id` from authed user
• Org-B user sees only Org-B tickets (reverse verification)
• Added `HasFactory` to Ticket model + created `TicketFactory`
• All 14 tests passing (9 auth + 1 health + 4 tenant isolation) :white_check_mark:

_Branch:_ `feature/seeder-and-tests` (pushed)
_PR:_ <https://github.com/yatharthsachdeva23/forge-02/pull/new/feature/seeder-and-tests>

_What Needs Your Call:_
Create PR + merge when ready :pray:

text:
_Sprint 2 — Ticket/Comment API Controllers + Tests: DONE_ :mechanical_arm:

_What I Did:_

TicketController:
• `GET /api/tickets` — paginated, filters by status/priority/text search (subject+description)
• `POST /api/tickets` — auto-sets `requester_id` to authed user, org_id via TenantOwned
• `GET /api/tickets/{id}` — TenantScope enforces org ownership
• `PUT /api/tickets/{id}` — update status/priority/assignee_id
• `POST /api/tickets/{id}/assign` — set assignee_id

CommentController:
• `GET /api/tickets/{ticket_id}/comments` — customers filtered from internal comments
• `POST /api/tickets/{ticket_id}/comments` — auto-stamps `user_id`, `is_internal` forced false for customers

_Security tests:_
:white_check_mark: Customer cannot see internal comments
:white_check_mark: Customer cannot create internal comment (silently forced false)
:white_check_mark: Cross-org access returns 404

_Tests:_ 30/30 passing (9 auth + 1 health + 4 tenant + 10 ticket API + 6 comment API)

_Branch:_ `feature/sprint2-api` (pushed)
_PR:_ <https://github.com/yatharthsachdeva23/forge-02/pull/new/feature/sprint2-api>

_What Needs Your Call:_ Create PR + merge :pray:

text:
_Sprint 3+4 — Full React Frontend: DONE_ :mechanical_arm:

_What I Did:_

Scaffold:
• Vite + React 19 + Tailwind CSS 4
• Axios + lucide-react + react-router-dom
• API client with auto token injection + 401 redirect

Auth Client:
• `/login` + `/register` pages with Tailwind cards
• Token + user in localStorage
• Auto-redirect unauthenticated → `/login`

Dashboard:
• Sidebar (PulseDesk, user profile, logout)
• Top bar: status + priority filters + search
• Ticket grid with colored status/priority badges
• Click to open thread detail

Ticket Thread Detail:
• Subject, description, requester, assignee, priority
• Comments from API
• Comment form + "Internal Note (Agent Only)" checkbox
• Internal comments: amber/yellow background
• Customers excluded from internal comments

Ticket Creation Modal:
• Subject, description, priority
• POST /api/tickets

_Verified:_ `npm run dev` compiles and serves on localhost:3000 :white_check_mark:

_Branch:_ `feature/frontend-react` (pushed)
_PR:_ <https://github.com/yatharthsachdeva23/forge-02/pull/new/feature/frontend-react>

_What Needs Your Call:_ Create PR + merge :pray:
